title: Antimicrobial resistance - Canada.ca
content:
## Antimicrobial resistance
What we’re doing to address antimicrobial resistance. Learn about responsible use of antimicrobials to help prevent resistance in people and animals.

### About antimicrobial resistance
What antimicrobials are used for, what causes resistance

### Prevention and risks
Protecting yourself, using antimicrobials responsibly, risks to people, who is most at risk
What we’re doing to prevent the spread, how we monitor, how we support responsible antimicrobial use
The One Health approach, common issues, and how Canada is advancing One Health
Resources to raise awareness for the public, educators and health providers

### Veterinary drugs and health products
Antimicrobials in animals, regulatory lists incorporated by reference, veterinary antimicrobial sales

### Reserve list for antimicrobial drugs
List  of antimicrobial drugs that should be used sparingly to preserve effectiveness

### Health professionals
Antimicrobial stewardship, infection prevention and control measures

### Surveillance programs and systems
How we monitor use of antimicrobials and antimicrobial resistance in Canada
